note: Browser navigated to /app/o/demo/assignments/new on port 33180 after restarting the broken local server. The mock Browser session resolved to the individual home fallback, so route-level org builder visibility is covered by focused component tests; Browser confirmed the active rendered fallback had no stale LinkedIn gate language, no runtime error, one main landmark, and no overflow.
